channel.title: fullstack on probablyalex
channel.description: Recent content in fullstack on probablyalex

item.title: Building the Notetaker of All Time
item.description: A few months ago, I wrote about momentum, finding the right hill, and rolling down it.

item.title: CS348 Final Project — Formula 1 SQL
item.description: As a part of CS 348, Introduction to Database Management, we had the option to create a project using a database.

item.title: Tutorial: Learning Full-Stack Development With a Project
item.description: Project-based learning is one of the most enjoyable and effective ways to learn new skills.
